official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the container_set_data packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, writing, reading, and observing the container_set_data body.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound container_set_data frame.

field_notes.container_id: Uses the official FriendlyByteBuf.writeContainerId/readContainerId surface with a small non-zero container id.
field_notes.data_id: Uses the official FriendlyByteBuf.writeShort/readShort surface with a small non-zero data id.
field_notes.value: Uses the official FriendlyByteBuf.writeShort/readShort surface with a positive signed-short value.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound container_set_data packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official numeric container id, data id, and value fixture only; do not infer menu property semantics, inventory state, initialized game state, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
